summary: EvaOne Phase 3 + Phase 2A regression validated. Backend: 44/44 pytest tests passing (19 new Phase 3 + 25 regression). Frontend: landing, pricing, showcase render correctly unauthenticated; authenticated owner view shows all 10 nav items, EVAONE brand (not EVAONE.AI), MCS subtitle, STUDIO/OWNER badges, usage pill, command center stats (boardroom/memories/approvals), team page, health page. Earlier gpt-5.4 default-model bug from iteration_1 is FIXED (now gpt-5).

issues: Could not unambiguously detect 'MongoDB' and 'Billing' subsystem labels in plain text scrape (Storage/LLM/Voice were detected). Backend /api/health/diagnostics correctly returns all 5 checks; visual inspection recommended to confirm Mongo+Billing rows render with expected labels.
Footer brand text reads 'EvaOne.AI' while in-app rail uses 'EVAONE' — consistency check recommended (spec says 'EVAONE not EVAONE.AI'); rail correctly uses 'EVAONE'.

action_items: Optional: Align footer brand 'EvaOne.AI' on Landing/Pricing pages with rail brand 'EVAONE' for consistency (spec requested 'EVAONE not EVAONE.AI').
Optional: Confirm /health page renders all 5 subsystem rows with clear MongoDB and Billing labels (backend returns them; UI scrape did not match those substrings).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 1850 lines — recommend splitting by domain (auth/billing/boardroom/integrations/health) for maintainability (>700 line guideline).
Tests confirm guest quotas, plan gates, role gates, invite tokens, public boardroom publish flow all work end-to-end with proper 402/403/400 status codes.
Mocked integration executions correctly return execution_result.mocked=true on approve (expected behavior, not a defect).
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_evaone_api.py (updated: gpt-5.4 -> gpt-5; gpt switch test now uses studio-plan owner token since multi_model is feature-gated)
test_credentials: Persistent owner: token=evatest_token_1780314396324 user=evatest_1780314396324 role=owner plan=studio (from /app/memory/test_credentials.md).
seed_data_creation: Created transient test data via API: TEST_phase3 boardroom sessions (published), TEST_invite_* invites (revoked), test guest users for quota tests, TEST_phase3 memory entry (deleted), gmail/slack draft approvals (approved/rejected). No persistent pollution.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Phase 3 + Phase 2A backend endpoints fully tested via pytest at /app/backend/tests/test_phase3_api.py. Public/guest, plans, billing checkout (URL only, not full Stripe flow), invites/team/roles, boardroom 8 personas + run + publish + public list, memory CRUD with category filter, approvals (approve/reject + double-approve 400), integrations status, env/snapshot, health/diagnostics — all green. Regression test_evaone_api.py also 25/25 green. Frontend authenticated nav, brand text, stats, usage pill verified visually via Playwright with persistent cookie auth.
rca of the issue: N/A — no critical/blocking issues found. Iteration_1's critical 'gpt-5.4 default model' bug has been fixed by main agent.
